mapper.select: /* TM_CL24001_Dao_retrieveDrspExcclcList */ SELECT A.excclc_year, ( SELECT ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = ( SELECT upper_cls_cd FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = CD.upper_cls_cd AND cmmn_cd = CD.upper_cmmn_cd ) AND cmmn_cd = ( SELECT upper_cmmn_cd FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = CD.upper_cls_cd AND cmmn_cd = CD.upper_cmmn_cd ) ) AS basin_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd CD WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2002' AND cmmn_cd = A.bplc_cd_id ) AS basin_nm, ( SELECT ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(UPP HR) */ stext FROM ( SELECT cmmn_cd FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = CD.upper_cls_cd AND cmmn_cd = CD.upper_cmmn_cd ) UPP LEFT JOIN HRM.vm_hr01a01 HR ON UPP.cmmn_cd = HR.objid AND SYSDATE BETWEEN HR.strdt AND HR.enddt ) AS dept_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd CD WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2002' AND cmmn_cd = A.bplc_cd_id ) AS dept_nm, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd CD WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2002' AND cmmn_cd = A.bplc_cd_id ) AS bplc_nm, A.bplc_cd_id, ( NVL(A.mon01_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon02_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon03_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon04_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon05_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon06_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon07_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon08_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon09_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon10_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon11_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon12_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon01_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon02_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon03_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon04_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon05_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon06_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon07_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon08_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon09_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon10_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon11_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon12_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.time_add_excclc_amt, 0) + NVL(B.time_add_excclc_amt, 0) ) AS excclc_amt_total, ( NVL(A.mon01_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon02_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon03_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon04_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon05_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon06_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon07_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon08_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon09_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon10_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon11_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon12_iem_vu, 0) ) AS bass_amt_total, A.mon01_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon01, A.mon02_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon02, A.mon03_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon03, A.mon04_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon04, A.mon05_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon05, A.mon06_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon06, A.mon07_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon07, A.mon08_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon08, A.mon09_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon09, A.mon10_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon10, A.mon11_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon11, A.mon12_iem_vu AS bass_amt_mon12, ( NVL(B.mon01_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon02_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon03_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon04_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon05_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon06_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon07_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon08_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon09_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon10_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon11_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon12_iem_vu, 0) ) AS acmslt_amt_total, B.mon01_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon01, B.mon02_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon02, B.mon03_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon03, B.mon04_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon04, B.mon05_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon05, B.mon06_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon06, B.mon07_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon07, B.mon08_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon08, B.mon09_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon09, B.mon10_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon10, B.mon11_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon11, B.mon12_iem_vu AS acmslt_amt_mon12, (A.time_add_excclc_amt + B.time_add_excclc_amt) AS time_add_excclc_amt, CASE WHEN A.frst_regist_dt > B.frst_regist_dt THEN A.frst_regist_dt ELSE B.frst_regist_dt END AS frst_regist_dt, CASE WHEN A.frst_regist_dt > B.frst_regist_dt THEN A.frst_rgstr_id ELSE B.frst_rgstr_id END AS frst_rgstr_id, CASE WHEN A.last_updt_dt > B.last_updt_dt THEN A.last_updt_dt ELSE B.last_updt_dt END AS last_updt_dt, CASE WHEN A.last_updt_dt > B.last_updt_dt THEN A.last_updusr_id ELSE B.last_updusr_id END AS last_updusr_id, CASE WHEN A.last_updt_dt > B.last_updt_dt THEN A.updt_rsn ELSE B.updt_rsn END AS updt_rsn FROM ( SELECT excclc_year, bplc_cd_id, iem_nm, mon01_iem_vu, mon02_iem_vu, mon03_iem_vu, mon04_iem_vu, mon05_iem_vu, mon06_iem_vu, mon07_iem_vu, mon08_iem_vu, mon09_iem_vu, mon10_iem_vu, mon11_iem_vu, mon12_iem_vu, time_add_excclc_amt, frst_regist_dt, frst_rgstr_id, last_updt_dt, last_updusr_id, updt_rsn FROM tm_cl24001 WHERE iem_nm = 'bassAmt' AND excclc_year = SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT excclc_year, bplc_cd_id, iem_nm, mon01_iem_vu, mon02_iem_vu, mon03_iem_vu, mon04_iem_vu, mon05_iem_vu, mon06_iem_vu, mon07_iem_vu, mon08_iem_vu, mon09_iem_vu, mon10_iem_vu, mon11_iem_vu, mon12_iem_vu, time_add_excclc_amt, frst_regist_dt, frst_rgstr_id, last_updt_dt, last_updusr_id, updt_rsn FROM tm_cl24001 WHERE iem_nm = 'acmsltAmt' AND excclc_year = SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4) ) B ON A.excclc_year = B.excclc_year AND A.bplc_cd_id = B.bplc_cd_id ORDER BY A.excclc_year, A.bplc_cd_id
mapper.update:
/* TM_CL24001_Dao_saveDrspExcclcList */ MERGE INTO tm_cl24001 A USING ( SELECT #{excclcYear} AS excclc_year, #{bplcCdId} AS bplc_cd_id, #{iemNm} AS iem_nm, #{mon01IemVu} AS mon01_iem_vu, #{mon02IemVu} AS mon02_iem_vu, #{mon03IemVu} AS mon03_iem_vu, #{mon04IemVu} AS mon04_iem_vu, #{mon05IemVu} AS mon05_iem_vu, #{mon06IemVu} AS mon06_iem_vu, #{mon07IemVu} AS mon07_iem_vu, #{mon08IemVu} AS mon08_iem_vu, #{mon09IemVu} AS mon09_iem_vu, #{mon10IemVu} AS mon10_iem_vu, #{mon11IemVu} AS mon11_iem_vu, #{mon12IemVu} AS mon12_iem_vu,
0 AS time_add_excclc_amt, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.excclc_year = B.excclc_year AND A.bplc_cd_id = B.bplc_cd_id AND A.iem_nm = B.iem_nm ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.mon01_iem_vu = B.mon01_iem_vu, A.mon02_iem_vu = B.mon02_iem_vu, A.mon03_iem_vu = B.mon03_iem_vu, A.mon04_iem_vu = B.mon04_iem_vu, A.mon05_iem_vu = B.mon05_iem_vu, A.mon06_iem_vu = B.mon06_iem_vu, A.mon07_iem_vu = B.mon07_iem_vu, A.mon08_iem_vu = B.mon08_iem_vu, A.mon09_iem_vu = B.mon09_iem_vu, A.mon10_iem_vu = B.mon10_iem_vu, A.mon11_iem_vu = B.mon11_iem_vu, A.mon12_iem_vu = B.mon12_iem_vu, A.time_add_excclc_amt = B.time_add_excclc_amt, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.excclc_year, A.bplc_cd_id, A.iem_nm, A.mon01_iem_vu, A.mon02_iem_vu, A.mon03_iem_vu, A.mon04_iem_vu, A.mon05_iem_vu, A.mon06_iem_vu, A.mon07_iem_vu, A.mon08_iem_vu, A.mon09_iem_vu, A.mon10_iem_vu, A.mon11_iem_vu, A.mon12_iem_vu, A.time_add_excclc_amt, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.excclc_year, B.bplc_cd_id, B.iem_nm, B.mon01_iem_vu, B.mon02_iem_vu, B.mon03_iem_vu, B.mon04_iem_vu, B.mon05_iem_vu, B.mon06_iem_vu, B.mon07_iem_vu, B.mon08_iem_vu, B.mon09_iem_vu, B.mon10_iem_vu, B.mon11_iem_vu, B.mon12_iem_vu, B.time_add_excclc_amt, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
